Title: User navigates to settings from the homepage
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Impostazioni".
2. Verify that the settings page opens.
Expected Result: The settings page should open successfully.

Title: User views a new location without interacting further
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Visualizzazione nuovo luogo".
2. Verify that no further action is taken.

Title: User clicks on a location and then on Pathfinder
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Visualizzazione nuovo luogo".
2. Click on "Click sul luogo".
3. Click on "Click Pathfinder".

Title: User swipes up on the homepage
Preconditions: User is on the homepage.
Test Steps: 1. Swipe up on the homepage.
Expected Result: No specific action should occur as there is no defined behavior for this interaction.

Title: User navigates to the system map from the detailed page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Navigate".

Title: User opens Yelp in a browser from the detailed page and initiates a call
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Open in Browser".
2. Click on "Call Business".
Expected Result: A call to the business should be initiated.

Title: User returns to the homepage from the detailed page after opening Yelp in a browser
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Open in Browser".
2. Click on "Indietro".

Title: User returns to the homepage from the detailed page after initiating a call
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Call Business".
2. Click on "Indietro".

Title: User modifies preferences from the detailed page
Preconditions: User is on the detailed page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Like/Dislike".

Title: User navigates back to the homepage from the Pathfinder page
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Indietro".

Title: User views a question and selects a response leading to a suggested location
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Indietro".
2. Click on "Visualizzazione domanda".
3. Click on "Scelta risposta".
4. Click on "Visualizzazione luogo suggerito".
Expected Result: A suggested location should be displayed.

Title: User views a question and selects a response leading to no suggested location
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps:
1. Click on "Indietro".
2. Click on "Visualizzazione domanda".
3. Click on "Scelta risposta".
4. Click on "suggerimento non disponibile".
Expected Result: A message indicating no suggestion is available should be displayed.

Title: User navigates back to the homepage without viewing a question
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Indietro".

Title: User navigates to the homepage from the Pathfinder page without any interaction
Preconditions: User is on the Pathfinder page.
Test Steps: 1. Click on "Indietro".
